suite.name: Mast-Jwst-Dom

kw.name: Route Api
kw.doc: Intercept requests matching *url_pattern* and return mock data.

kw.name: Open Capture
kw.doc: Open a browser and navigate to *url*.

kw.name: Wait For Selector
kw.doc: Wait until *selector* is in the given *state* (default ``visible``).

kw.name: Capture Step
kw.msg: [capture] Step 0: '^The JWST Observation Search form' (dom mode)
kw.doc: Capture the current page state as a demo step.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Fill a form field identified by *selector*.

kw.name: Capture Step
kw.msg: [capture] Step 1: 'Enter an object name or sky coordinates' (dom mode)
kw.arg: caption=Enter an object name or sky coordinates
kw.doc: Capture the current page state as a demo step.

kw.name: Capture Step
kw.msg: [capture] Step 2: 'Search results load from the mock API' (dom mode)
kw.arg: caption=Search results load from the mock API
kw.doc: Capture the current page state as a demo step.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: Keyword 'Evaluate' found both from a custom library 'guidestar.rf.GuidestarCapture' and a standard library 'BuiltIn'. The custom keyword is used. To select explicitly, and to get rid of this warning, use either 'guidestar.rf.GuidestarCapture.Evaluate' or 'BuiltIn.Evaluate'.
kw.doc: Evaluate a JavaScript *expression* in the page context and return result.

kw.name: Capture Step
kw.msg: [capture] Step 3: 'Scroll through the observation list' (dom mode)
kw.doc: Capture the current page state as a demo step.

kw.name: Export Demo
kw.msg: [capture] Wrote wireframe: /Users/kconroy/repos/docs-wireframe-demo/examples/rf/../../examples/wireframes/mast-jwst-dom.html [capture] Wrote config: /Users/kconroy/repos/docs-wireframe-demo/examples/rf/../../examples/wireframes/mast-jwst-dom.json [capture] Wrote standalone: /Users/kconroy/repos/docs-wireframe-demo/examples/rf/../../examples/wireframes/mast-jwst-dom-standalone.html [capture] Done. 4 step(s) captured.
kw.doc: Write wireframe HTML and JSON demo config to *out_dir*.

suite.doc: DOM-mode capture of MAST JWST Observation Search.

errors.msg: Keyword 'Evaluate' found both from a custom library 'guidestar.rf.GuidestarCapture' and a standard library 'BuiltIn'. The custom keyword is used. To select explicitly, and to get rid of this warning, use either 'guidestar.rf.GuidestarCapture.Evaluate' or 'BuiltIn.Evaluate'.
